case_title: ANNE MAKOVEC VS. SUTTER HEALTH CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY MAKOVEC, ANNE SUTTER HEALTH CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER - VAN NESS CAMPUS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF ANNE MAKOVEC IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JOHN FREEMAN. DEFENDANT SUTTER HEALTH CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARY S. KUSBER, RISK OFFICER (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT SUTTER HEALTH CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER APPEARANCE BY ZOOM FOR TODAY'S TRIAL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT SUTTER HEALTH CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.
